display.purpose: Masthead lockup only; one italic word in gilt.

headline.purpose: Plain-language 'how I read your request' sentence.

title.purpose: Serif title per pick (uniform across entries).

prose.purpose: The serif 'why this pick' justification and descriptions — the book's voice.

label.purpose: Intent tab and the uppercase 'Generated SQL' summary.

shadows.name: cover-contact
shadows.purpose: Every cover at rest — sets the book on the paper.

shadows.name: cover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cover on hover/focus, paired with a 4px rise.

shadows.name: artifact
shadows.purpose: The framed SQL receipt, barely raised.

shadows.name: cloth-seam
shadows.purpose: Shadow under the 1px bone rule at the cloth→paper hinge.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Exponential ease-out for all state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: rise-stagger
motion.purpose: Results stagger in as a list — fade + 12px rise, 70ms per item.

motion.name: shimmer
motion.purpose: Loading skeleton sweep on paper-toned blocks.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The 'Recommend' action — a bone label sewn onto the oxblood cloth.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(0.320 0.105 27); background: oklch(0.955 0.012 70); border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.85rem 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.90 0.04 65); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ask Field
components.description: Paper-white field inset into the cloth, with a gilt focus glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-ask" type="text" placeholder="e.g. something melancholic about memory and loss" />
components.css: .ds-ask { width: 100%; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; color: oklch(0.245 0.018 35); background: oklch(0.992 0.004 45); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.95rem 1.05rem; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 5px oklch(0.25 0.08 27 / 0.28); } .ds-ask::placeholder { color: oklch(0.585 0.016 38); } .ds-ask:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 5px oklch(0.25 0.08 27 / 0.20), 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.86 0.05 65 / 0.55); }

components.name: Prompt Link
components.description: Understated serif 'Try —' invitation on the cloth; hairline underline, never a pill.
components.html: <button class="ds-prompt">sci-fi with a strong female lead</button>
components.css: .ds-prompt { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(0.955 0.012 70); background: none; border: none; padding: 0.1rem 0; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.95 0.012 70 / 0.35); transition: color 0.16s, border-color 0.16s; } .ds-prompt:hover { color: oklch(0.90 0.05 65); border-bottom-color: oklch(0.90 0.05 65); }

components.name: Intent Tab
components.description: Quiet catalog-tab chip for the routed intent, with a leading dot. Always paired with a text label.
components.css: .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem 0.25rem 0.55rem; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.935 0.034 155); color: oklch(0.385 0.072 156); } .ds-tab::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.85; }

components.name: Shelf Entry
components.description: A ranked, annotated recommendation: serif numeral, cover-object, title, byline, serif reason. No card.
components.html:
• 1

    The Remains of the Day

    Kazuo Ishiguro · 1989 · ★ 4.12

    A butler reckons, too late, with a life spent in service — the quietest possible study of memory.
components.css: .ds-entry { list-style: none; display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto auto 1fr; column-gap: 1.5rem; align-items: start; padding: 2rem 0; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.885 0.010 45); } .ds-rank { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.470 0.150 28); line-height: 1; text-align: right; } .ds-cover { width: 140px; aspect-ratio: 2/3; border-radius: 3px; background: oklch(0.885 0.010 45); border: 1px solid oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.12); box-shadow: 0 1px 1px oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.10), 0 8px 18px oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.16); transition: transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 0.22s; } .ds-cover:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 2px 3px oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.12), 0 16px 34px oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.24); } .ds-body { min-width: 0; } .ds-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.3rem; line-height: 1.18; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.245 0.018 35); } .ds-byline { margin: 0.4rem 0 0; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.455 0.018 35); } .ds-star { color: oklch(0.400 0.140 28); font-weight: 600; } .ds-why { margin: 0.85rem 0 0; font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.55; color: oklch(0.32 0.018 35); max-width: 64ch; } .ds-why::before { content: '\201C'; font-size: 1.4em; line-height: 0; color: oklch(0.470 0.150 28); margin-right: 0.15em; vertical-align: -0.25em; }

components.name: Generated SQL Artifact
components.description: A framed, dignified query receipt — uppercase summary with rotating caret, mono SQL, open by default.
components.html:
Generated SQL
SELECT isbn13, title, authors
FROM books
WHERE description ILIKE '%memory%'
  AND average_rating >= 3.5
ORDER BY average_rating DESC;
components.css: .ds-sql { background: oklch(0.992 0.004 45); border: 1px solid oklch(0.885 0.010 45); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.05), 0 6px 16px oklch(0.30 0.05 35 / 0.07); overflow: hidden; } .ds-sql > summary { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.7rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; list-style: none; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.455 0.018 35); } .ds-sql > summary::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-right: 1.5px solid oklch(0.470 0.150 28); border-bottom: 1.5px solid oklch(0.470 0.150 28); transform: rotate(-45deg); transition: transform 0.2s; } .ds-sql[open] > summary::before { transform: rotate(45deg); } .ds-sql pre { margin: 0; padding: 0.85rem 1rem 1rem; font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.83rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.36 0.05 28); white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.885 0.010 45); }

narrative.overview: The interface is built as a book is bound: a drenched oxblood cloth 'cover' at the top carries the ask, and it opens across a fine bone seam onto warm-paper 'pages' where the recommendations are read. Cloth signals 'this is where you ask'; paper signals 'this is where you read'. The system is organized around one line — the books are the hero — which shows up as a dual typographic voice (Fraunces serif for the books, Inter sans for the tool), as covers presented as physical objects on the paper, and as a ranked annotated shelf rather than a grid of identical tiles. It rejects the dark admin dashboard the app used to be, generic AI-chat UI, retail clutter, landing fluff, and the cozy-books cream-sepia-Garamond reflex.
keyCharacteristics: A drenched oxblood 'cover' up top; warm-paper 'pages' below, joined by a bone seam.
Dual voice: Fraunces serif for the books, Inter sans for the tool.
Covers are objects on paper (contact shadow, edge, hover-lift) — never carded.
Results are a ranked annotated shelf with uniform 140px cover objects.
One committed accent (oxblood) for actions, links, ranking, ratings; intent uses quiet tabs.
Transparency styled with dignity: plain-language intent + a framed SQL artifact.

rules.name: The Cloth-and-Paper Rule
rules.body: Oxblood is where you ask; paper is where you read. Never put long reading prose on the cloth, and never tint the paper toward sand to warm it — warmth is the cloth's job, carried by accent, type, and covers.

rules.name: The One-Hue Accent Rule
rules.body: The accent is the cloth color surfaced — every interactive and ranking mark on paper is one oxblood hue. The three intent tints are quiet status semantics; they never compete with the accent.

rules.name: The Dual-Voice Rule
rules.body: If it's part of a book — a title, a reason, a description — it's set in the serif. If it's part of the tool — a button, a field, a label, a count — it's set in the sans.

rules.name: The Earned-Numeral Rule
rules.body: Serif rank numerals appear only because the picks are a genuine ranked sequence. They are not a decorative 01/02/03 scaffold and appear nowhere else.

rules.name: The Object-or-Frame Rule
rules.body: Shadow exists to make a book an object or to frame the one query artifact — nothing else. No shadowed cards, no decorative drop shadows.

dos: Do keep oxblood as where you ask and paper as where you read; carry warmth through cloth, serif and covers, never by tinting the paper toward sand.
Do set every book element in Fraunces serif and every tool element in Inter sans.
Do present covers as objects on the paper: contact shadow, 3px radius, 1px edge, hover-lift; every cover is a uniform 140px object, ranking carried by the serif numeral.
Do keep the one oxblood accent for actions, links, ranking and ratings; keep intent tints quiet and always paired with a text label.
Do present the routed intent in plain language and frame the generated SQL as a dignified artifact, open by default.
Do hold all text to WCAG AA (≥4.5:1), including bone-soft on the cloth gradient's lightest point; give the cloth field a visible gilt focus ring.
donts: Don't revert toward the old dark Bootstrap/admin dashboard (#0f1115 field, blue accent).
Don't drift into generic AI-chat UI (bubble threads, blinking cursors, gradient-purple) or Goodreads/Amazon retail clutter.
Don't fall into the cozy-books AI reflex: cream/sand body, sepia wash, or generic Garamond.
Don't box the picks in a card grid — the shelf is a ranked annotated list ordered by the serif numerals (uniform entries, not resized tiles).
Don't use an uppercase tracked eyebrow above the reason — the accent quote mark carries it; numerals appear only as the real ranked sequence.
Don't add shadow as decoration — shadow makes a book an object or frames the SQL artifact, nothing else.
